purpose: Port CHAT_MESSAGE_KIND (kind 9) and kind-7 reaction handling out of MarmotContext and ChatStoreContext into isolated handler modules wired through the applicationRumorDispatcher

public_api.name: chatHandler
public_api.signature: RumorHandler (kind: 9) — exported object with { kind, handle(rumor, ctx) }
public_api.description: Handles kind-9 chat messages: parses imeta tags, calls appendMessage, conditionally calls incrementUnread (not own-send), bumps setChatVersion

public_api.name: REACTION_RUMOR_KIND
public_api.description: Named constant for the reaction rumor kind, introduced in reactionHandler.ts

public_api.name: reactionHandler
public_api.signature: RumorHandler (kind: 7) — exported object with { kind, handle(rumor, ctx) }
public_api.description: Handles kind-7 reaction rumors: gates on target message existence in IDB, calls applyInboundRumor, bumps setReactionsVersion if non-null result

public_api.name: buildDispatcher
public_api.description: Composition root in registerHandlers.ts — extended to wire chatHandler and reactionHandler
